ground_truth.title: Job Search & Training — Workforce Solutions Capital Area
ground_truth.main_content: Job Search & Training. Train for a new career | Find a job now | Career Events & Workshops | Additional Resources. We tailor financial resources specifically to your needs to help you plan your career and increase your income. We have people here to support you at any point in your career journey. Every year, we place thousands of local people in jobs thanks to our direct connection to local employers. JUMPSTART YOUR CAREER. Take the first step to explore different career paths, training opportunities, or learning more about our services. By completing the form, you can register by text for an upcoming orientation that fits your schedule. Meet our team and see all the ways we can support your career journey! Our career center amenities and career counseling services are available to everyone! For career training scholarships and case-managed services, you may be eligible if you live in Austin/Travis County and are authorized to work in the U.S. and meet at least one of the below criteria: You're unemployed, have been laid off, or classify as low-income (Note: You can classify as low-income even if you're employed); Have a high school diploma and no further post-secondary certification. SCHOLARSHIPS AVAILABLE! Train for a Career. Train for a job that will provide great pay and stability for you and your family — starting today! Workforce Solutions scholarships support training for some of the region's high-skill, high-growth occupations. We can help you determine what you want to study, award you with a scholarship, and connect you to employment. Many of our programs include wraparound services, including transportation, child care assistance, mobile hotspots, and more. Earn and Learn through Apprenticeships. Paid training and apprenticeships are an option for a variety of industries. We help many people who want to train for their future and still earn an income to pay for day-to-day expenses. Find a Job Now. Registering for WorkInTexas.com is your first step to finding employment. Take advantage of this free, online job resource tool and wraparound supports available through Workforce Solutions Capital Area. WorkInTexas.com benefits include: Access to thousands of local and statewide jobs; Online real-time job searches; Contact information for employers; Email notifications of job matches; Professional resume wizard; Helpful career tools; State of Texas or teacher applications; Ability to save your searches. Find the Path to a Brighter Future. Use our online Career Coach to explore careers and training in our region or take an assessment to see what careers are best for you! Career Events & Workshops. Join us to learn how to get the most out of Work In Texas, create effective resumes, ace job interviews, succeed at work, directly connect to employers, and more. Texas Workforce Commission Unemployment Insurance Services handles all Unemployment Insurance matters. UI services are available online 24/7, and by telephone Monday-Friday from 7:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m. All individuals who file an unemployment insurance claim must register for work at WorkInTexas.com. The Targeted Occupations Lists are used to guide the investment of workforce program funds for training. Workforce Solutions Capital Area regularly analyzes the regional labor market, looking for industry and occupational trends. Career Planning & Labor Market Information: Get help identifying the best job opportunities in the Austin-Travis County region. Labor Market Information: We analyze local and regional labor market data to provide real-time, in-depth knowledge for your career search. Career Coach: Explore careers and training in our region or take an assessment to see what careers are best for you! Veteran Services: We provide priority service to veterans and their spouses. For People with Disabilities: We provide accessibility equipment to assist people with disabilities. Youth Services: Workforce Solutions Capital Area helps low-income youth (ages 14–24) prepare for success in the classroom – and on the job. You can receive work-readiness and life skills that will help you achieve your career goals. Free Online Learning: Metrix Learning gives you access to self-paced, expert approved training for 180 days! Pass your courses with 80% or higher to earn a certificate of completion. Contact Us. Call Our Hotline: 512.485.3792. Visit a Career Center: Three locations to help you find your next career. Drop Us a Line: Use our online form.
